## normalizeFrontmatter() function

Return a detached normalized record without mutating page data or frontmatter.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function normalizeFrontmatter<TFrontmatter extends object>(pageData: PageDataLike<TFrontmatter>, options?: NormalizeFrontmatterOptions): NormalizedFrontmatter<TFrontmatter>;
```
